channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][发表] Anime News Network TV Asahi 宣布 新作 Short 动画 Programming Block PicoAni
item.description: New short anime block will debut 4 new anime in October 2026, January 2027 ― TV Asahi announced its new short anime programming block "PicoAni" on Monday, and revealed its lineup of titles, including... | 来源: ANN | 原文: TV Asahi Announces New Short Anime Programming Block 'PicoAni'

item.title: [动画] Anime News Network HIDIVE Stream Im Dating a Dark Summoner 动画
item.description: Anime premieres in October ― HIDIVE announced on Monday that it will stream the short anime of Shaoh's I'm Dating a Dark Summoner (Dark Summoner to Dekiteiru) manga beginning this October for the... | 来源: ANN | 原文: HIDIVE to Stream I'm Dating a Dark Summoner Anime
